title: BWP Retextured
description: A resourcepack for bedwarspractice.club, that overhauls the menus and items of games like block sumo! Works as an overlay, so you can use other resourcepacks with it!
body:
![All beta block sumo, sumo duels and block sumo items, without animations or 3d models.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c74bcef185a55763bbb9547da5cd8d62bdf39d7.png)

<details>
<summary>Description of the items in the image</summary>

Left to right: invis, jump, mega bat, thors hammer, bridge egg, tnt rain activator, clear ray, decliner, knockback catalyst, blaze of glory, kb pot, speed, bat, block smasher, wool spores, rail gun, bat bomb, rift blade, extra life, glacial wraith.

</details>


### A texturepack for **bedwarspractice.club** that aims to give **non-vanilla items and menus** their own textures! 
## Includes **100+** textures, **10+** animated ones, and a couple **custom models**!

- This texturepack should be compatible with almost any other texturepack, just put BWP Retextured at the **top** of you resourcepack list.

- **Optifine** and the version **1.8.9** required. Enable custom item textures in the settings.


I publish all of my resourcepacks for **free**, and ad revenue is usually around 3$ per month from all of them combined, so any donations are very appreciated.

[![A pixelart of the word "donate"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92ff631c976bd58fbb443ae89158499badb2a6b7.png)](https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted_button_id=B75MGYUT2UCDC)

### If you want to report a bug or have a suggestion, you can message me on discord @aspoleczne

## Features
  
- All items from beta block sumo, block sumo and block sumo duels
- Many of those have custom models, animations or textures changing with durability left
- The main menu panorama (shows the main lobby)
- Custom splash texts
- Custom level icon
- Quest master
- Lobby items
- Game select, extra and lobby switcher menus, as well as the menus inside
- Technique and custom course selector
- Cosmetics menu
- Server store
- All options inside techniques (checkpoints, difficulty, upvote etc.)
- Recording options
- Bridging and block extension technique npcs
- Private games and bot duel menus
- Post-game menu (requeue, spectate etc.)
- Game results menu
- Bridging trainer
- /chatpref
 
And many more!
